63382.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
63382.description: Stanley Tucci explores his former home, Tuscany, with a wine bar crawl, celebrating the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes which use stale bread as the key ingredient.

63383.title: Inside Africa
63383.description: The powerful voices of the Cape Town Opera Company tell universal stories. Follow along as they build a new audience and educate the next generation about this classic art form.

63384.title: African Voices Changemakers
63384.description: Uplifting young girls in Ghana by teaching them to code and become leaders, and in Sierra Leone, efforts to develop early childhood education and mental health access.

63385.title: Living Golf
63385.description: We preview the Olympic golf competition with a look at the history of golf in the Olympic Games. Plus, learn about Japan's unique golfing culture.

63386.title: Marketplace Africa
63386.description: Nigerian companies bring healthcare systems online in an effort to improve health outcomes across the region; the CEO of Bakhresa Group talk about the company's history.

63387.title: Marketplace Africa
63387.description: A look at the contemporary African art market; given the wide range of applications, satellites are part of the solution when it comes to solving the connectivity gap in Africa.

63388.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes

63389.title: Quest's World of Wonder
63389.description: Perched on the rocky cliffs above a shimmering sea are medieval ramparts, nearly perfectly intact, protecting a gem inside. Explore the real heart and soul of Dubrovnik.
